title: Life is S-Rank
overview: Sam is an ordinary young woman whose passion is video games and everything that surrounds them.

title: I am N00b
overview: Sam's indie game is review bombed after a streamer releases a negative review.

title: Unity of the Guild
overview: Sam goes to Marshall's apartment to tell him she made Ruminate, but a gorgeous woman greets her at the door.

title: Witch, Wizard, Sword Master and The King of Beasts
overview: Marshall feels guilty for ruining Sam's game dev dreams, but his attempts to apologize are unsuccessful.

title: Peel
overview: Sam learns about Marshall's past and thinks about her own dreams and work while worrying about her future.

title: ADS -Aim Down Sights-
overview: Link and Sam run into Monica and Marshall at the dog park. Meanwhile, Charles recalls an event from the past.

title: Good Game
overview: Sam arrives at work and despairs when she finds her desk completely cleared.

title: Unalive
overview: Marshall's health deteriorates and affects his streaming. Monica asks Sam about appearing in a video.

title: Replay
overview: Marshall fulfills his promise to Sam and begins replaying Ruminate.

title: Ruminate Journey
overview: Marshall is fascinated by the world of Ruminate. Meanwhile, Sam attends a business meeting with Charles.

title: Bard
overview: Marshall joins a knight on a quest to vanquish a dragon, and Sam worries about her relationship with Link.

title: CONTINUE
overview: Marshall suddenly collapses after completing Ruminate and is rushed to the hospital.
